title: I have a question
wikitext:
[]: I have a question (SPOILERS, EVERYBODY! SPOILERS!)             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Mon Sep 07, 2009 8:44 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Sep 07, 2009 9:23 pm Well I dont think they showed the mouth opening in the cage, however im prettty sure they was a cosmic blue explosion if I remember correctly.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Mon Sep 07, 2009 10:37 pm Well,I'm not sure if the mouth opened or not but Unit 03's eye's did glow red which indicated the angel infected Eva 03.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Tue Sep 08, 2009 4:36 pm Eva 04 wrote: Well,I'm not sure if the mouth opened or not but Unit 03's eye's did glow red which indicated the angel infected Eva 03.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Sep 08, 2009 5:24 pm No, I mean did they show when Bardiel actually entered Eva-03? I remember the Eva's rampage, but I don't remember the angel infecting him.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Tue Sep 08, 2009 6:01 pm No.They cut that out.Although,we didnt really see how it infected unit 03 in the series either.Only close thing we have is we see a little spark when it goes through that cloud.Dont know if that's what you meant.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Tue Sep 08, 2009 6:49 pm Eva 04 wrote: No.They cut that out.Although,we didnt really see how it infected unit 03 in the series either.Only close thing we have is we see a little spark when it goes through that cloud.Dont know if that's what you meant.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Sep 09, 2009 12:04 am Agreed.That spark was the closest we got to seeing what the 13th angel might look like.We'll probably never know what it truly looks like because as you said.A parasite is hard to spot.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Sep 09, 2009 1:31 pm Considering the growth we see inside Unit 03 and on Toji, it's probably some sort of fungal spore.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Sep 09, 2009 2:30 pm I kinda hope that the "infection of Unit-03 during it's flight" scene will be added on one of the DVD editions as an extra. Would be nice.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Wed Sep 09, 2009 4:16 pm Maybe it'll be in 2.01 or 2.11 or whatever Anno's boiling up...

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Sep 09, 2009 7:47 pm That would be possible and a good idea.I think it's important to see how the Eva get's infected like in the series.We'd probably actually get to see it this time if it's put as an extra considering they have a bigger budget and everything.But that's just wishful thinking.

Article: I have a question

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Sep 07, 2009 9:23 pm Well I dont think they showed the mouth opening in the cage, however im prettty sure they was a cosmic blue explosion if I remember correctly.
